description:
Lancom Technology has built scalable and flexible video conferencing application on AWS for use in the insurance industry. Learn how Lancom scales with AWS Fargate, optimizes cost with S3, and leverages Amazon EC2 flexibility. These benefits enable agents to assess their clients’ damages remotely, speeding up the processing of insurance claims.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
